[Assistant] Wave 2 — spawning all 4 agents in parallel.
[tool: Bash(git add product/features/col-031/agents/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
impl: wave 1 — query_log store method + Infer) → [feature/col-031 7ae450f] impl: wave 1 — query_log store method + InferenceConfig (#414)

[Assistant] Agents committed directly. Wave 1 is in. Adding remaining agent reports and proceeding to Wave 2.
[tool: Bash(git log --oneline -5 && grep -n "PhaseFreqRow" crates/unimatrix-store/src/query_log.rs | head -5) → ff9165c impl(query_log): extract tests to query_log_tests.rs — enforce 500-line limit (#414)
9f2c280 impl(query_log): add PhaseFreqRow struct and query_phase_freq_table method (#414)
a3b02e4 impl(infra/config): raise w_phase_explicit to 0.05, add query_log_lookback_days field (#414)
7c8da0f pseudo]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
Batch bugfix swarm procedure: parallel investigators + parallel architects + single rust-dev + single tester
Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
